cases.prompt_body: Side view of a Therac-25 linear accelerator room just after treatment, off-white treatment head and table remain canonical and calm, a plain white sheet on the table carries one narrow overbright heat-scorch line at torso level while the machine posture stays routine, no patient body visible, no bore-shaped scanner, no readable console text, pale beige walls, charcoal floor shadow, clinical fluorescent light

styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents
styles.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, Side view of a Therac-25 linear accelerator room just after treatment, off-white treatment head and table remain canonical and calm, a plain white sheet on the table carries one narrow overbright heat-scorch line at torso level while the machine posture stays routine, no patient body visible, no bore-shaped scanner, no readable console text, pale beige walls, charcoal floor shadow, clinical fluorescent light
